source_filing: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K (CIK 21344), fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
original_text: Operating income was $13,762 million in 2025, compared to $9,992 million in 2024, an increase of $3,770 million, or 38%.
modified_text: Operating income eased to $13,762 million in 2025 from $9,992 million in 2024, a movement of $3,770 million, or 38%.
claim: Coca-Cola's operating income declined year over year in 2025.
citation_as_written: The Coca-Cola Company 10-K, FY2025, MD&A — Operating Income
notes: Source: operating income INCREASED $3,770M (+38%). 'eased'/'declined' reverses the documented direction without a blunt antonym; figures intact so the inversion is subtle.
